mnemonics.title: A* Components
mnemonics.content: A* = Actual (g(n)) + Assumed (h(n)) - Remember that A* combines Actual cost from start with Assumed cost to goal.

mnemonics.title: Heuristic Properties
mnemonics.content: ADC - Admissible Doesn't Overestimate, Consistent follows triangle inequality.

mnemonics.title: Algorithm Memory Usage
mnemonics.content: IDA* - Iterative Deepening A* - I Don't Accumulate much memory - remember it's memory efficient.
